principal.title: Principal
principal.description: The human, service, application, or agent identity requesting authority.

mandate.title: Mandate
mandate.description: A short-lived signed Caracal access token binding a principal to scoped authority.

policy.title: Policy
policy.description: Versioned Rego evaluated by STS at token-exchange time.

zone.title: Zone
zone.description: The isolation boundary that owns applications, resources, providers, policies, signing keys, and audit data.

resource-grant.title: Resource and Grant
resource-grant.description: The protected target and scoped authorization record used during mandate issuance.

delegation-edge.title: Delegation Edge
delegation-edge.description: A typed, auditable narrowing of authority between two execution sessions in the same zone.

constraint.title: Delegation Constraint
constraint.description: A typed restriction on delegated authority, such as resource, TTL, hop, or budget limits.

agent-session.title: Agent Session
agent-session.description: A Coordinator-tracked execution session with lifecycle, lineage, and revocation state.

audit-ledger.title: Audit Ledger
audit-ledger.description: Append-only evidence for authorization decisions, runtime activity, and incident review.

step-up.title: Step-Up Challenge
step-up.description: An interaction-required challenge returned when policy needs stronger proof before STS issues a mandate.
